Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPPRODUTOSENTREGAR', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &HojeData = serverdate() loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &HojeData.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False &ProCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'ENTREGAR PRODUTOS' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PedSts = Status_pedido.FECHADO &PedSts.Enabled = 0 &PedDtaPrv_To = serverdate() &PedDtaPrv = &PedDtaPrv_To.AddDays(-30) &PedDtaPrv_To = &PedDtaPrv_To.AddDays(30) EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ DuplicatasSelect.Caption = trim(str(&sdtProdutos.Count)) + ' - Produtos Selec.' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &IconSelecionar.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &IconSelecionar.TooltipText = "" &AjusteProduto.FromImage(GAMActionSubscribe) &AjusteProduto.TooltipText = "Adicionar/Alterar Ajuste" &EntregarSemConfirmacao.FromImage(ActionExportFile) &EntregarSemConfirmacao.TooltipText = "Entregar Sem Comprovante." if PedItmCmpInt.Length() > 15 &PedItmCmpInt = substr(PedItmCmpInt, 1, 15) + '...' Else &PedItmCmpInt = PedItmCmpInt Endif &PedDtaPrvWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &PedDtaPrvWithTags = trim(PedDtaPrv.ToFormattedString()) If PedDtaPrv < &HojeData &PedDtaPrvWithTags = format(!"", "Prazo de Entrega Excedido.") + &PedDtaPrvWithTags EndIf If PedDtaPrv = (&HojeData) &PedDtaPrvWithTags = format(!"", "Entrega programada para Hoje.") + &PedDtaPrvWithTags EndIf If PedDtaPrv <= (&HojeData+7) and PedDtaPrv > &HojeData &PedDtaPrvWithTags = format(!"", "Entrega programada para os próximos 7 dias.") + &PedDtaPrvWithTags EndIf If PedDtaPrv >= (&HojeData+7) &PedDtaPrvWithTags = format(!"", "Entrega programada para mais de 7 dias.") + &PedDtaPrvWithTags EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxPedCod = PedCod &AuxPedItmCod = PedItmCod &AuxProCod = ProCod do 'VerificaSelecionada' // Do case // Case PedDtaPrv < &HojeData // &Status.FromImage(IconVermelho) // &Status.TooltipText = 'Prazo de Entrega Excedido.' // CAse PedDtaPrv = (&HojeData) // &Status.FromImage(IconAzul) // &Status.TooltipText = 'Entrega programada para Hoje.' // CASe PedDtaPrv <= (&HojeData+7) // &Status.FromImage(IconAmarelo) // &Status.TooltipText = 'Entrega programada para os próximos 7 dias.' // Case PedDtaPrv >= (&HojeData+7) // &Status.FromImage(IconVerde) // &Status.TooltipText = 'Entrega programada para mais de 7 dias.' // EndCase EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line in Grid &AuxPedCod = PedCod &AuxPedItmCod = PedItmCod &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProRef = ProGraRef &AuxProNomGra = ProNomGra do 'AddRemoveSDT' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndFor Refresh EndEvent Event 'DoDesmarcar' &IsAddRemove = false For Each Line in Grid &AuxPedCod = PedCod &AuxPedItmCod = PedItmCod &AuxProCod = ProCod do 'RemoveSDT' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndFor Refresh EndEvent Event 'DoEntregar' if &sdtProdutos.Count > 0 padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'CONFIRMAENTREGA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtProdutos.ToXml(), &PadDtaMod) &sdtProdutos.Clear() wpConfirmaEntrega.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Refresh Else msg('Nenhum Produto Selecionado') Endif EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAREF" &ProGraRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOMGRA" &ProNomGra.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAPRV" &PedDtaPrv.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaPrv_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDITMSTS" &PedItmSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLIRAZ", "", not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAREF", "", not &ProGraRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOMGRA", "", not &ProNomGra.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNomGra, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAPRV", "", not (&PedDtaPrv.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaPrv_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaPrv.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaPrv_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDITMSTS", "", not &PedItmSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedItmSts, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event limpar_campo.Click &sdtProdutos.Clear() refresh EndEvent Event &IconSelecionar.Click &IsAddRemove = true &AuxPedCod = PedCod &AuxPedItmCod = PedItmCod &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProRef = ProGraRef &AuxProNomGra = ProNomGra do 'AddRemoveSDT' Refresh EndEvent Event &EntregarSemConfirmacao.Click &sdtProdutos.Clear() &sdtProdutosItem = new() &sdtProdutosItem.PedCod = PedCod &sdtProdutosItem.PedItmCod = PedItmCod &sdtProdutosItem.ProCod = ProCod &sdtProdutosItem.ProRef = ProGraRef &sdtProdutosItem.ProNom = ProNomGra &sdtProdutos.Add(&sdtProdutosItem) prcGravaStatusDevolvido.call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, 'E', &sdtProdutos) Refresh EndEvent Event &AjusteProduto.Click wpaddObsItem.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'VerificaSelecionada' &IconSelecionar.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) For &sdtProdutosItem in &sdtProdutos if &sdtProdutosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod and &sdtProdutosItem.PedItmCod = &AuxPedItmCod &IconSelecionar.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) exit Endif EndFor EndSub Sub 'AddRemoveSDT' &IsExiste = false For &sdtProdutosItem in &sdtProdutos if &sdtProdutosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod and &sdtProdutosItem.PedItmCod = &AuxPedItmCod &Index = &sdtProdutos.IndexOf(&sdtProdutosItem) &IsExiste = true if &IsAddRemove = true &sdtProdutos.Remove(&Index) Endif exit Endif EndFor if &IsExiste = false &sdtProdutosItem = new() &sdtProdutosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod &sdtProdutosItem.PedItmCod = &AuxPedItmCod &sdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &sdtProdutosItem.ProRef = &AuxProRef &sdtProdutosItem.ProNom = &AuxProNomGra &sdtProdutos.Add(&sdtProdutosItem) Endif EndSub Sub 'RemoveSDT' For &sdtProdutosItem in &sdtProdutos if &sdtProdutosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod and &sdtProdutosItem.PedItmCod = &AuxPedItmCod &Index = &sdtProdutos.IndexOf(&sdtProdutosItem) &sdtProdutos.Remove(&Index) exit Endif EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
